description_long: This is a modern entertainment wall unit composed of a long, low TV console with multiple storage compartments, drawers, and cabinets, paired with a matching wall-mounted shelving system. The TV console features a flat top surface supporting a widescreen television, with two cabinet doors on the left, two drawers on the right, and an open shelf in the center. Above, a long horizontal shelf and a geometric arrangement of box shelves provide additional storage or display space. The unit is finished in a light beige or off-white color with subtle gray accents, and stands on short, angled legs. The design is sleek and minimalist, suitable for contemporary urban interiors. The materials appear to be primarily wood or engineered wood with a smooth, matte finish.
description: A modern, light-colored entertainment wall unit with a TV console, drawers, cabinets, and wall-mounted shelves in a minimalist style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the TV console with cabinet doors, drawers, open shelf, TV, and the full wall-mounted shelving system above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the console and shelves, with the TV profile visible and the layered structure apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the console and shelves, with the TV's back panel and the geometric arrangement of the upper shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the thickness of the console and the vertical alignment of the shelving system.
